ast.source: Are you sure you want to merge

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 高级笔记编辑器：正在合并文件夹

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Default frontmatter merge strategy to use when merging notes. Can be changed in the merge/split modal dialog.
ast.target: 合并笔记时使用的默认 frontmatter 合并策略。可在合并/拆分对话框中更改。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: When merging frontmatter values from note A to note B:
ast.target: 将笔记 A 的 frontmatter 值合并到笔记 B 时：

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: - copy values from A to B that were not in B yet, and overwrite existing values in B with values from A.
ast.target: - 将 A 中 B 尚未有的值复制到 B，并用 A 的值覆盖 B 中的现有值。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: - copy values from A to B that were not in B yet, and keep existing values in B.
ast.target: - 将 A 中 B 尚未有的值复制到 B，并保留 B 中的现有值。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: - keep existing values in B, and ignore values from A.
ast.target: - 保留 B 中的现有值，并忽略 A 的值。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: - remove existing values in B, and copy values from A to B.
ast.target: - 移除 B 中的现有值，并将 A 的值复制到 B。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: - copies new frontmatter from A into a separate frontmatter key in B.
ast.target: - 将 A 中的新 frontmatter 复制到 B 中一个单独的 frontmatter 键中。

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 是否在合并/拆分后对目标文件运行

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: on the destination file after merging/splitting.

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Whether to replace invalid characters in the title.
ast.target: 是否替换标题中的无效字符。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If disabled, the error will be shown for invalid titles.
ast.target: 如果禁用，无效标题将显示错误。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: String to replace invalid characters with.
ast.target: 用于替换无效字符的字符串。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Leave blank to remove invalid characters.

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: How to handle the title property in the frontmatter.
ast.target: 如何处理 frontmatter 中的标题属性。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: - do not add the title property to the frontmatter.
ast.target: - 不将标题属性添加到 frontmatter。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: - add the title property to the frontmatter only if the title is cannot be used as a filename.
ast.target: - 仅当标题无法用作文件名时，才将标题属性添加到 frontmatter。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: - add the title property to the frontmatter always.
ast.target: - 始终将标题属性添加到 frontmatter。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Default setting for whether to treat title as path. Can be changed in the merge/split modal dialog.
ast.target: 是否将标题视为路径的默认设置。可在合并/拆分对话框中更改。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: commands, the setting will be treated as disabled.
ast.target: 命令时，该设置将被视为禁用。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Template to use when merging notes.
ast.target: 合并笔记时使用的模板。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Whether to open the target note after splitting.
ast.target: 是否在拆分后打开目标笔记。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If enabled, the target note will be opened after splitting.
ast.target: 如果启用，拆分后将打开目标笔记。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If disabled, the source note will stay opened after splitting.
ast.target: 如果禁用，拆分后源笔记将保持打开状态。

ast.name: appendText

ast.target: 将笔记拆分为新文件时使用的模板。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: In merge/split dialog include notes from the following paths

ast.source: Insert each path on a new line

ast.name: appendText

ast.target: 您可以使用路径字符串或

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If the setting is empty, all notes are included
ast.target: 如果设置为空，则包含所有笔记

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: In merge/split dialog exclude notes from the following paths
ast.target: 在合并/拆分对话框中排除来自以下路径的笔记

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If the setting is empty, no notes are excluded

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Default setting for whether to swap entire folder structure. Can be changed in the swap folders modal dialog.
ast.target: 是否交换整个文件夹结构的默认设置。可在交换文件夹对话框中更改。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If enabled, the entire folder structure will be swapped.
ast.target: 如果启用，将交换整个文件夹结构。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If disabled, only the top-level files of the folders will be swapped.
ast.target: 如果禁用，仅交换文件夹的顶层文件。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: core plugin. You can safely switch it off to avoid duplicated functionality.
ast.target: 核心插件。您可以安全地将其关闭以避免功能重复。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This means something IS WRONG in your setup. You access the t function before i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage was done. Wait for the callback or Promise to resolve before accessing it!!!
